HomePage.tagline: //TO CREATE IDEAS THAT TRANSCEND FORMATS AND STAND THE TEST OF TIME

AboutPage.whoWeAreParagraph1: We are an agency founded in 2025 that continues the legacy of the legendary Agens from the 1960s.
AboutPage.whoWeAreParagraph2Before: We are more than an agency —
AboutPage.whoWeAreParagraph2After: that combines fashion, art, and creativity in search of results that do not go unnoticed.
AboutPage.ourStoryParagraph1: In 2025, Agens was born with the support of the Newsan Group, bringing together people from different disciplines to create a different kind of space where creativity is the heart of the business.
AboutPage.ourStoryParagraph2: Today, the agency works with both Newsan Group clients and external clients.

PoliciesPage.title: PRIVACY POLICY
PoliciesPage.intro: At Agens, we take privacy seriously. This Policy explains what data we collect when you visit our site, what we use it for, and what your rights are.
PoliciesPage.introAccept: By browsing our website, you accept the practices described below.

section1.title: 1. Who We Are
section1.content:
Agens is an advertising and creative agency. We are responsible for the processing of personal data collected through our website.

If you have questions about this Policy, you can write to us at: privacidad@agens.com

section2.title: 2. What Information We Collect
section2.content1:
We collect data that you voluntarily share with us when you:
- Fill out a contact form
- Send us an email
- Subscribe to updates

This data may include:
- Full name
- Email
- Phone number
- Company
- Job title
- Any other data you choose to send us
section2.content2:
When you browse our site, we may also collect certain technical information, such as:
- IP address
- Browser type
- Device used
- Pages visited
- Browsing time

This is done through cookies and analytics tools.

section3.title: 3. How We Use the Information
section3.content:
We use the data to:
- Respond to inquiries
- Contact potential clients
- Send information about our services (if you gave us your consent)
- Improve the site experience
- Analyze web usage to optimize content
- Comply with legal obligations

We do not sell or trade personal data.

section4.title: 4. Cookies
section4.content:
Our site may use cookies to improve navigation and understand how the website is used.

You can configure your browser to reject or delete cookies at any time. Please note that some site features may not work properly if you disable them.

section5.title: 5. Who We Share Information With
section5.content:
We may share data only when necessary with:
- Technology providers (hosting, email platforms, analytics tools)
- Public authorities, if required by law

We always ensure that those who access the information maintain adequate standards of confidentiality and security.

section6.title: 6. How Long We Keep Data
section6.content: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected or while a commercial or potential relationship exists.

section7.title: 7. Information Security
section7.content:
We adopt reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect data against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.

However, no system is completely infallible.

section8.title: 8. Links to Other Sites
section8.content: Our site may contain links to third-party pages. We are not responsible for their privacy practices. We recommend reviewing their own policies.

section9.title: 9. Your Rights
section9.content:
In accordance with Law 25,326 on the Protection of Personal Data of the Argentine Republic, you may:
- Access your data
- Request its rectification or update
- Request its deletion

The National Directorate for the Protection of Personal Data is the regulatory body for this law.

To exercise your rights, write to us at: privacidad@agens.com

section10.title: 10. Minors
section10.content: Our site is not intended for persons under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect data from minors.

section11.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
section11.content: We may update this Policy when necessary. The current version will always be published on our site with its update date.
